questions.question: Spark cluster: 50 executors × 16 GB RAM. CloudWatch показывает: avg CPU = 25%, avg memory = 35%. Pipeline runs 4 hours daily. Как оптимизировать?

options.text: Right-sizing: 1) CPU 25% → switch to smaller instance (m5.xlarge → m5.large), 2) Memory 35% → reduce executor memory (16 GB → 10 GB), 3) Reduce executors (50 → 25) + enable dynamic allocation. Expected: 50-60% cost reduction, similar runtime with proper partitioning

questions.explanation: Over-provisioned cluster: 25% CPU + 35% memory = 60-75% waste. Right-sizing: match instance to actual utilization. Dynamic allocation: scale executors up/down per stage. ARM instances (Graviton): 20% cheaper, same perf. Result: 50-60% cost savings without performance impact.

questions.question: Data platform: monthly cloud bill = $50K. CTO: 'Оптимизируйте до $30K'. Нет visibility в cost breakdown. Первый шаг?

options.text: Cost visibility: настроить AWS Cost Explorer / GCP Billing с breakdown по team, pipeline, layer. Tagging strategy: каждый ресурс tagged (team, pipeline, environment). Определить top-5 cost drivers → оптимизировать по приоритету. Нельзя оптимизировать то, что не измерено
Уменьшить retention до 7 дней для всех данных

questions.explanation: Step 1: measure. Cost visibility → understand WHERE money goes. Typical findings: 60% compute (over-provisioned), 25% storage (no lifecycle), 15% network (cross-region). Tagging → attributable costs per team/pipeline. Top-5 optimization → achievable 30-40% reduction. Without visibility → random cuts that may break production.

questions.question: Kafka cluster: 3 brokers, 500 topics, retention = 30 days для всех. Storage: 20 TB. 60% трафика — low-priority debug logs. Как оптимизировать?

options.text: Tiered retention: critical topics (orders, payments) — 30 days. Analytics events — 7 days. Debug logs — 24 hours (или tiered storage: hot 24h → S3 cold 30d). Compression: enable zstd (30-50% size reduction). Результат: 20 TB → ~8 TB active storage

questions.studyHint: Повторите раздел Kafka Cost Optimization — Retention и Tiered Storage
questions.explanation: Per-topic retention: match retention to business value. Debug logs (60% traffic) с 30d retention = waste. 24h retention для debug: 12 TB → 400 GB. Tiered storage (KIP-405): hot data на broker disks, cold → S3 (10x cheaper). zstd compression: 30-50% reduction. Combined: significant storage savings без потери critical data. Удалить topics (c) — потеря debug capability. Pulsar (b) — migration cost, не решает retention problem.

questions.question: Snowflake bill: $20K/month. Query profile: 70% — scheduled dbt jobs (warehouse XL), 30% — ad-hoc analyst queries (warehouse XL). Оптимизация?

options.text: Multi-warehouse strategy: dbt jobs → dedicated warehouse (size M, auto-suspend 1 min, scheduled scale-up during batch window). Ad-hoc → separate warehouse (size S, auto-suspend 5 min). Кластеризация: cluster key на часто фильтруемых колонках. Result caching: повторяющиеся queries бесплатны

questions.studyHint: Повторите раздел Cloud Warehouse Cost Optimization — Multi-cluster Strategy
questions.explanation: Multi-warehouse isolation: dbt batch (predictable, can right-size) vs ad-hoc (variable, smaller sufficient). XL for both = over-provisioned для ad-hoc. Auto-suspend: minimize idle compute. Clustering: reduce scan volume → lower credits. Result cache: exact same query = 0 credits. Expected savings: 30-40% от $20K.
